ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the user */,
  "program_of_study" TEXT /* Program of study of the user */,
  "hobby" TEXT /* Hobby of the user */,
  "self_intro" TEXT /* Self-introduction of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture URL of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user within the university campus */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Privacy settings for the user's profile */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user last used the platform */,
  "verification_status" INTEGER /* Verification status of the user's account */,
  "two_factor_auth" INTEGER /* Two-Factor Authentication status */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Notification preferences of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the match */,
  "matched_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the matched user */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was made */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "match_score" INTEGER /* Compatibility score between users */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., romantic, friendship) */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in days */,
  "match_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., like, super like) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_matched_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("matched_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interests" (
  "interest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the interest */,
  "interest" TEXT /* Interest of the user */,
  "interest_category" TEXT /* Category of the interest */,
  "interest_level" TEXT /* Level of interest (e.g., beginner, intermediate, expert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "reported_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reported user */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was made */,
  "report_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "report_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the report (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "admin_comments" TEXT /* Comments from administrators */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reported_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("reported_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blocks" (
  "block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each block */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the block */,
  "blocked_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blocked user */,
  "block_date" TEXT /* Date when the block was made */,
  "block_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the block */,
  "block_status" TEXT /* Status of the block (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blocks_blocked_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocked_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "requested_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the requested user */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "request_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the request */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., match, friend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_requested_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("requested_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., match, message) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the administrator account */,
  "admin_role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator (e.g., super admin, moderator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the administrator */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the administrator account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id")
)
